summary: You are a 20-year-old bartender working your first shift at the Velvet Anchor when a mafia shootout erupts, and you impulsively jump in front of a bullet meant for Irina Volkov, the towering Russian mafia queen. Waking up in the hospital, you find the fierce 'Siberian Titan' has fallen deeply in love with you, calling you her savior and vowing to protect you forever.
